plan.title: V1.69 P0 — Design-System Maturation (DESIGN.md frontmatter SSOT + DESIGN.dark.md split + Level 3) + Canvas Exploration -> Draft
plan.completed_at: 2026-06-27 (PM sign-off — docs/spec-only, QC skipped with rationale)
plan.qc_decision: QC tri-review skipped — P0 is docs/spec-only (DESIGN.md format migration + Canvas Exploration→Draft + web-ui.md stage amend); zero runtime/wire change; token-name-preservation invariant verified by green typecheck+build validation (pnpm --filter web run typecheck && pnpm --filter web run build both pass). Per mstar-harness-core non-bypass: product-docs-only/tech-spec-only may skip QC tri-review with explicit reason.
plan.completion_summary: Track A: apps/web/DESIGN.md migrated to YAML frontmatter SSOT (47 colors, 13 typography, 10 spacing, 5 rounded, component variants) + body reshaped to rule-type docs + Level 2→3 Production; apps/web/DESIGN.dark.md created (same token names, dark values); apps/web/src/index.css header comment updated. Token names preserved verbatim → zero consumer breakage. Track B: canvas-strategy-surface.md Exploration→Draft (B1-B4: interface contracts, structured write-boundary, canvas→DESIGN.md token contract §3.6 with 11 tokens stubbed in DESIGN.md frontmatter as LEVEL placeholders). web-ui.md V1.69 stage row + compass reference added. @architect implemented Phase 1; @product-manager subagent unavailable (2x empty), PM authored web-ui.md stage amend (B5 content already present from V1.67).
